@workspace /new

Act as a Senior Software Architect and QA Engineering Lead.

I am building "Talos" — an autonomous Test Automation & Logic Orchestration System.

The Goal: Create an E2E testing engine that uses GitHub MCP for codebase discovery, RAG for test context, and Playwright for test execution with self-healing capabilities.

Architecture & Tech Stack:

Language: TypeScript (Strict mode).
Runtime: Node.js
Test Framework: Playwright with Page Object Model
AI: GitHub Copilot SDK for test generation and healing
Vector DB: LanceDB for RAG context storage
Database: SQLite via better-sqlite3

Your Task: Generate a project plan for the next feature iteration of Talos.
